scripts.test: pnpm --filter @wongsorn-labs/atlas-lineage-db test && pnpm --filter @wongsorn-labs/atlas-lineage-api test && pnpm --filter @wongsorn-labs/atlas-lineage-web test
scripts.test:cov: pnpm --filter @wongsorn-labs/atlas-lineage-db test:cov && pnpm --filter @wongsorn-labs/atlas-lineage-api test:cov && pnpm --filter @wongsorn-labs/atlas-lineage-web test:cov
